data.title: Malaga Financial Corp. reports $16,431,000 net income for 9 months of 2025, a 5% decrease, with $5,481,000 in Q3 net income.
data.description: Malaga Financial Corporation, the parent company of Malaga Bank FSB, reported a net income of $16,431,000 for the nine months ending September 30, 2025, resulting in a 5% decrease from the same period in 2024. The net income for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, was $5,481,000, reflecting a 1% decrease from the previous year. The company's annualized return on average equity for the first nine months of 2025 was 10.15%, and the annualized return on average assets was 1.57%. The decrease in net income was partly due to the absence of a one-time Employment Retention Credit of $500,000 reported in 2024.

data.title: Domino's expected to report lower Q3 earnings at $3.97/share (down from $4.19/share), revenue of $1.14 billion (up from $1.08 billion) on Oct. 14. Shares closed at $413.50.
data.description: Domino's Pizza, Inc. is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, October 14. Analysts are predicting earnings of $3.97 per share, lower than the $4.19 per share reported in the same period last year. The company is expected to reveal a quarterly revenue of $1.14 billion, up from $1.08 billion last year. In the second quarter, Domino's surpassed expectations with revenue reaching $1.15 billion. Following this news, the company's shares increased by 0.5% and closed at $413.50 on Wednesday. For more detailed analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's platform.

data.title: Dow falls over 250 points, Nasdaq down 0.44% to 22,942.90, S&P 500 drops 0.47% to 6,722.31. Delta Air Lines beats estimates.
data.description: During midday trading, U.S. stocks showed a mixed performance, with the Dow Jones index dropping over 250 points on Thursday. The Dow was down by 0.60% at 46,320.74, while the NASDAQ fell by 0.44% to 22,942.90. Additionally, the S&P 500 saw a decline of 0.47% to 6,722.31. Consumer staples shares experienced a 0.3% increase, while industrials stocks fell by 0.9% the previous trading day. Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE: DAL) reported better-than-expected adjusted EPS and revenue for Q3, with operating revenue at $16.7 billion, a 6% YoY increase. GAAP EPS was $2.17, up by 10% from the previous year, while adjusted EPS surpassed estimates at $1.71. Delta predicts a 2-4% total revenue growth for the December quarter. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Book intertwines baseball, family, faith, and miracles as angel transforms Rutters' farm; a tale of life's magic.
data.description: A family farm in SCRANTON, Pa., experienced a life-altering event when an angel appeared, transforming the Rutters' lives in a magical way. On Oct. 9, 2025, the seemingly ordinary setting of their farm became the backdrop for a miraculous encounter. The story's author, Peter Paul, highlights how miracles can unfold in the most unexpected places, whether it be in serene fields, under an expansive sky, or amidst the challenges of everyday family dynamics. This encounter serves as a poignant reminder of the potential for extraordinary events to shape our lives, resonating with readers through the power of its storytelling.

data.title: Chayn acquires Garbo assets to boost gender-based violence support amid rising cases, ensuring enhanced services and outreach.
data.description: In New York, amidst escalating cases of gender-based violence, two survivor-centered non-profit organizations, Chayn and Garbo, are collaborating to address the issue. This partnership aims to combat the increasing instances of GBV by leveraging the expertise and resources of both organizations. The number of reported gender-based violence incidents has been steadily climbing, necessitating innovative and collaborative efforts like this to provide support and assistance to survivors. By pooling their strengths and knowledge, Chayn and Garbo are striving to make a meaningful impact in the fight against gender-based violence.

data.description: A recent report on the Saudi Arabia Precision Irrigation Market highlights its rapid growth potential, with projections showing an increase from US$ 82.86 million in 2024 to US$ 183.4 million by 2033. This surge is driven by the benefits of improved agricultural efficiency and water conservation. The market is expected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of [number]% during this period. data.title: iConnections and MFA to host 4th Annual Global Alts Asia in Singapore on Nov 10-12, 2025 at Marina Bay Sands. Largest event for institutional allocators and asset managers.
data.description: iConnections has revealed the details for the upcoming Global Alts Asia event, scheduled to take place at Marina Bay Sands in Singapore from 10th to 12th November 2025. In collaboration with the Singapore Tourism Board and Marina Bay Sands, this will mark the 4th edition of the event. Global Alts Asia is renowned as the premier capital introduction event in the region, bringing together the top institutional allocators, alternative asset managers, and family offices. The event will feature carefully organized meetings, impactful thought leadership sessions, and valuable networking opportunities for participants.

data.title: CalHOPE Courage Award program awards $62,500 in scholarships to high school student-athletes in California for overcoming adversity.
data.description: In Sacramento, California, on October 9, 2025, it was announced that a total of $62,500 in college scholarships will be awarded to honor high school seniors who have demonstrated the ability to overcome adversity and achieve success. This initiative builds on the success of the CalHOPE Courage Award program, which has been recognizing resilience among collegiate student-athletes for the past three years.

data.title: Luca Mining Corp. confirms full operational continuity at Tahuehueto mine after an environmental inspection in Tepehuanes, Durango.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 9, 2025, Luca Mining Corp. ("Luca") announced that operations at its Tahuehueto Gold Project in Tepehuanes, Durango are proceeding as usual. The Company, listed on the TSX Venture Exchange as LUCA, on the OTCQX as LUCMF, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange as Z68, confirmed this following an inspection.

data.title: Doceree integrates Spark with Oracle Health system, a leading EHR, enhancing HCP engagement. #AI #HealthcareMarketing.
data.description: In Short Hills, New Jersey on October 9, 2025, Doceree, a company specializing in AI-powered healthcare marketing, revealed the incorporation of its AI technology, Spark, with Oracle Health (previously Cerner), a major Electronic Health Record system. This move aims to enhance data management and marketing strategies within the healthcare sector. Oracle Health stands as one of the significant EHR systems used widely.

data.title: Consumer Watchdog urges CEC to set refinery inventory rules post Chevron explosion. Time to act on resupply says report.
data.description: Last week, an explosion and fire at the Chevron El Segundo refinery in Los Angeles served as a reminder of the urgent need for the California Energy Commission (CEC) to implement minimum refinery inventory and resupply regulations promptly. Consumer Watchdog emphasized this point in their comments to the CEC following the incident. This event highlights the necessity for regulations that ensure adequate inventory levels and timely resupply to prevent similar accidents in the future.
